design_philosophy: A high-clarity, industrial-feeling B2B e-commerce platform. It balances the stark, grid-based functionality of Swiss design (essential for complex data tables and bulk ordering) with subtle earthy/kraft-paper tones to represent eco-friendly/wholesale disposable goods. No consumer-flashy elements. Utility, speed, and trust are paramount.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter text-foreground leading-none

typography.import_instruction: Add Google Fonts imports for Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono to index.html.

colors.strategy: Bone White background, Industrial Charcoal text, and Safety Orange for high-visibility CTAs.

usage_rules.primary: Use ONLY for critical conversion actions: Add to Cart, Checkout, Login. Do not use for generic links.
usage_rules.background: Use standard background for the app. Use pure white (--card) for specific content blocks.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure black. The foreground is #1C1C1A.
usage_rules.hover_states: Hover states must have an explicit color change. e.g. hover:bg-primary/90.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid for the Admin Dashboard and Catalog. Dense, scanable.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Almost flat. Use rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-none for a crisp, technical look.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts where possible. For product grids, use border-r border-b border-border on items to create an unbroken grid.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. py-20 for section breaks on the storefront.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align text, labels, and inputs. Only center for specific hero headers or empty states.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Override radius to rounded-sm. Use 'default' variant for Primary Action (Safety Orange), 'outline' for secondary. Add transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0.
components.cards: Shadcn Card. Override with: no shadow (shadow-none), 1px solid border, bg-card, rounded-sm.
components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn Form/Input/Select. 1px solid border, focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-1. No heavy drop shadows.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Essential for Admin Dashboard and Product Bulk Pricing. Left-align columns. Use monospace font for SKUs and Prices. Use sticky header for long data.
components.badges: Shadcn Badge. Use for MOQ indicators, Statuses (Pending, Shipped). Use outline variant for neutral info, default for highlights.
components.bulk_pricing_table: 3-tier layout (e.g., Small Box, Pallet, Container). Columns with checkmarks (Phosphor icons). Emphasize MOQ boldly. Starting price anchor in large typography.

motion_and_interaction.strategy: Functional and snappy. No long fades.
motion_and_interaction.hover: Slight lift on product cards (hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-200).
motion_and_interaction.feedback: Use Sonner for toast notifications on 'Add to Cart' and status updates.

iconography.style: Use 'regular' weight for UI elements, 'duotone' for empty states or dashboard hero metrics.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.

image_urls.description: High stacks of cardboard boxes in warehouse. Use with a bg-black/40 overlay for the storefront hero section.
Workers in a spacious warehouse handling packages. Good for an 'About Us' or 'Fulfillment' info section.
Eco-friendly white plastic/biodegradable container on wooden table. Use for product catalog.
Cardboard box with recycles logo. Use for product catalog.
Person holding takeout boxes. Use for product lifestyle shots on product detail page.

media.rules: No placeholder image services allowed. Only use the provided media. Use object-cover for images.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Start by defining the Tailwind variables exactly as provided in the 'colors' section into src/index.css.
2. Add Google Fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono) to public/index.html.
3. Set up the Shadcn components (Button, Card, Input, Table, Badge, Dialog) and override their default border radii to '0.125rem' to match the technical, sharp B2B aesthetic.

4. For the Storefront: Build a hero section with the warehouse image, overlapping the text using a dark overlay (bg-black/50) to ensure text contrast. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4 for the product catalog with visible 1px borders between items.
5. For the Product Detail Page: Implement a prominent 'Bulk Pricing' table right below the product title, clearly showing Price, MOQ, and Savings.
6. For the Admin Dashboard: Create a dense, functional sidebar layout. Use Shadcn Tables heavily for Orders and Products. Keep the background light and borders crisp.
7. Ensure EVERY button, link, and form input has a kebab-case data-testid attribute.
